sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39901" key="e)pi/krousma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπί-κρουσμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n39901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">forcible blow</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
